transactions: July 2, 2009:Signed as a Free Agent with theSeattle Mariners.
November 24, 2015:Signed as a Free Agent with theBaltimore Orioles.
December 10, 2015:Drafted by theLos Angeles Angels of Anaheimfrom theBaltimore Oriolesin the 2015 rule 5 draft.
January 16, 2017:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
January 16, 2018:Signed as a Free Agent with theMilwaukee Brewers.
June 10, 2018:Traded by theMilwaukee Brewersto theTampa Bay RaysforBrad Millerand cash.
November 10, 2022:Traded by theTampa Bay Raysto thePittsburgh PiratesforJack Hartman(minors).
August 1, 2023:Traded by thePittsburgh PirateswithRich Hillto theSan Diego PadresforEstuar Suero(minors),Alfonso Rivas IIIandJackson Wolf.
February 16, 2024:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Mets.
